title: CI-shaped release gate command and exit codes
scope: Added a deterministic release gate CLI for CI consumption.
Mapped release gate status pass/fail/error to exit codes 0/1/2.
Updated release gate API results to include a curl-plus-CLI command that stores the response and evaluates it locally.
Covered pass, fail, error, and malformed JSON paths with focused tests.
acceptance: CI can invoke python -m notary_platform.release_gate_cli on a saved release gate result JSON.
Passing release gates return exit code 0.
Failing release gates return exit code 1.
Errored or malformed release gate results return exit code 2.
The command requires no live cloud credentials beyond the API call already represented by the release gate endpoint.
